hooks.command: /bin/bash -c 'DESC="$CLAUDE_TOOL_DESCRIPTION"; if [[ "$DESC" == *"Monitor build status"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"Wait"*"minutes"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"sleep"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"Sleep"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"scheduler"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"Slot"*"status"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"monitoring"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"Calculate wait"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"Check Jenkins build"* ]] || [[ "$DESC" == *"post-deployment validation"* ]]; then exit 0; fi; exit 1'
